sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n36011" key="e)noxlhte/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐνοχλ-ητέον</orth>, <sense id="n36011.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must annoy,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">οὐκ ἐ. τῷ θεῷ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0563.tlg001:11:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.Tyr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
